series_metadata.series_description: Bond / coupon payments - all debt service

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain for 3 fiscal years after records are audited. If GO Bond Certificates, provide the Ohio Historical Society an opportunity to review before destruction. ; Paper: Retain for 3 fiscal years after records are audited. If GO Bond Certificates, provide the Ohio Historical Society an opportunity to review before destruction., Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Shred
